prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on formaldehyde (CH₂O) using DFT at tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit RI) in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell RKS singlet). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, single-point (not re-optimized at DFT). SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: status ok, trustworthy true.

HOMO (index 7): −7.6523067 eV
LUMO (index 8): −1.7826355 eV
HOMO–LUMO gap: 5.8696712 eV (Koopmans-style orbital energy difference)
Total electronic energy: −114.55325 Hartree (−3117.1528 eV)

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 7.6523067 eV, vertical EA = 1.7826355 eV, electronegativity χ = 4.7174711 eV, chemical hardness η = 2.9348356 eV, softness S = 0.34073459 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity ω = 3.7914447 eV.

CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 formaldehyde.xyz
